message.content:
Research the patterns used in existing screen views in this project. I need to understand the exact structure for building a new "Reminders" screen. Please examine:

1. src/components/floating_notes/floating_notes_view.tsx - as it has a similar edit form subview pattern
2. src/data/notes_data.ts - for the mock data pattern with dates
3. src/extensions/ directory structure - to understand how extensions are registered
4. src/components/form/form_date_picker.tsx - the existing date picker component

For each file, summarize:
- Key types/interfaces
- Component structure (hooks, state, JSX patterns)
- How the extension is registered
- How forms are used for create/edit

Be thorough - I need to replicate these patterns exactly.

content.text: I'll systematically examine these files to understand the patterns used in this project. Let me search for and analyze each component.

content.content:

1→import { FloatingNotesView } from '../../components/floating_notes/floating_notes_view';
     2→import { NotesIcon } from '../../components/icons';
     3→import type { ExtensionManifest } from '../../registry/types';
     4→
     5→export const floatingNotesExtension: ExtensionManifest = {
     6→  id: 'floating-notes',
     7→  name: 'Floating Notes',
     8→  icon: NotesIcon(),
     9→  description:
    10→    'Create and manage quick notes. Markdown-enabled editor with auto-save.',
    11→  author: 'Raycast',
    12→  commands: [
    13→    {
    14→      name: 'floating-notes',
    15→      title: 'Floating Notes',
    16→      subtitle: 'Floating Notes',

    19→        'note',

    33→        markdown: `# Floating Notes
    34→
    35→Create and manage quick notes with a markdown-enabled editor.
    36→
    37→## Features
    38→- Auto-save with 500ms debounce
    39→- Markdown content support
    40→- Full-text search across notes

    42→        metadata: [

    55→    },
    56→  ],
    57→};

   144→
   145→export const TARGET_LANGUAGES = SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES.filter(
   146→  l => l.code !== 'auto',
   147→);
   148→
   149→export interface TranslationHistoryEntry {
   150→  id: string;
   151→  sourceText: string;
   152→  translatedText: string;
   153→  sourceLang: string;
   154→  targetLang: string;
   155→  detectedLang?: string;
   156→  createdAt: Date;
   157→}
   158→
   159→const MOCK_TRANSLATIONS: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
   160→  en: {
   161→    es: 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?',
   162→    fr: 'Bonjour, comment allez-vous ?',
   163→    de: 'Hallo, wie geht es Ihnen?',
   164→    it: 'Ciao, come stai?',
   165→    pt: 'Olá, como vai você?',
   166→    ja: 'こんにちは、お元気ですか？',
   167→    ko: '안녕하세요, 어떻게 지내세요?',
   168→    zh: '你好，你好吗？',
   169→    ru: 'Здравствуйте, как дела?',
   170→    ar: 'مرحبًا، كيف حالك؟',
   171→  },
   172→  es: {
   173→    en: 'Hello, how are you?',
   174→    fr: 'Bonjour, comment allez-vous ?',
   175→    de: 'Hallo, wie geht es Ihnen?',
   176→  },
   177→  fr: {
   178→    en: 'Hello, how are you?',
   179→    es: 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?',
   180→    de: 'Hallo, wie geht es Ihnen?',
   181→  },
   182→};
   183→
   184→function simpleWordSwap(text: string, targetLang: string): string {
   185→  const words: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
   186→    es: {
   187→      hello: 'hola',
   188→      world: 'mundo',
   189→      the: 'el',
   190→      is: 'es',
   191→      a: 'un',
   192→      and: 'y',
   193→      good: 'bueno',
   194→      morning: 'mañana',
   195→      night: 'noche',
   196→      thank: 'gracias',
   197→      you: 'tú',
   198→      yes: 'sí',
   199→      no: 'no',
   200→      please: 'por favor',
   201→      sorry: 'lo siento',
   202→      love: 'amor',
   203→      water: 'agua',
   204→      food: 'comida',
   205→      time: 'tiempo',
   206→      day: 'día',
   207→    },
   208→    fr: {
   209→      hello: 'bonjour',
   210→      world: 'monde',
   211→      the: 'le',
   212→      is: 'est',
   213→      a: 'un',
   214→      and: 'et',
   215→      good: 'bon',
   216→      morning: 'matin',
   217→      night: 'nuit',
   218→      thank: 'merci',
   219→      you: 'vous',
   220→      yes: 'oui',
   221→      no: 'non',
   222→      please: "s'il vous plaît",
   223→      sorry: 'désolé',
   224→      love: 'amour',
   225→      water: 'eau',
   226→      food: 'nourriture',
   227→      time: 'temps',
   228→      day: 'jour',
   229→    },
   230→    de: {
   231→      hello: 'hallo',
   232→      world: 'Welt',
   233→      the: 'das',
   234→      is: 'ist',
   235→      a: 'ein',
   236→      and: 'und',
   237→      good: 'gut',
   238→      morning: 'Morgen',
   239→      night: 'Nacht',
   240→      thank: 'danke',
   241→      you: 'du',
   242→      yes: 'ja',
   243→      no: 'nein',
   244→      please: 'bitte',
   245→      sorry: 'Entschuldigung',
   246→      love: 'Liebe',
   247→      water: 'Wasser',
   248→      food: 'Essen',
   249→      time: 'Zeit',
   250→      day: 'Tag',
   251→    },
   252→    pt: {
   253→      hello: 'olá',
   254→      world: 'mundo',
   255→      the: 'o',
   256→      is: 'é',
   257→      a: 'um',
   258→      and: 'e',
   259→      good: 'bom',
   260→      morning: 'manhã',
   261→      night: 'noite',
   262→      thank: 'obrigado',
   263→      you: 'você',
   264→      yes: 'sim',
   265→      no: 'não',
   266→      please: 'por favor',
   267→      sorry: 'desculpe',
   268→      love: 'amor',
   269→      water: 'água',
   270→      food: 'comida',
   271→      time: 'tempo',
   272→      day: 'dia',
   273→    },
   274→    ja: {
   275→      hello: 'こんにちは',
   276→      world: '世界',
   277→      the: '',
   278→      is: 'です',
   279→      a: '',
   280→      and: 'と',
   281→      good: '良い',
   282→      morning: '朝',
   283→      night: '夜',
   284→      thank: 'ありがとう',
   285→      you: 'あなた',
   286→      yes: 'はい',
   287→      no: 'いいえ',
   288→    },
   289→    it: {
   290→      hello: 'ciao',
   291→      world: 'mondo',
   292→      the: 'il',
   293→      is: 'è',
   294→      a: 'un',
   295→      and: 'e',
   296→      good: 'buono',
   297→      morning: 'mattina',
   298→      night: 'notte',
   299→      thank: 'grazie',
   300→      you: 'tu',
   301→      yes: 'sì',
   302→      no: 'no',
   303→    },
   304→  };
   305→
   306→  const dict = words[targetLang];
   307→  if (!dict) return `[${targetLang}] ${text}`;
   308→
   309→  return text
   310→    .split(/(\s+)/)
   311→    .map(token => {
   312→      const lower = token.toLowerCase();
   313→      const replacement = dict[lower];
   314→      if (replacement !== undefined) {
   315→        if (token[0] === token[0]?.toUpperCase() && replacement.length > 0) {
   316→          return replacement[0]!.toUpperCase() + replacement.slice(1);
   317→        }
   318→        return replacement;
   319→      }
   320→      return token;
   321→    })
   322→    .join('');
   323→}
   324→
   325→function detectLanguage(text: string): string {
   326→  const trimmed = text.trim();
   327→  if (!trimmed) return 'en';
   328→
   329→  if (/[\u3040-\u309F\u30A0-\u30FF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ja';
   330→  if (/[\uAC00-\uD7AF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ko';
   331→  if (/[\u4E00-\u9FFF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'zh';
   332→  if (/[\u0400-\u04FF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ru';
   333→  if (/[\u0600-\u06FF]/.test(trimmed)) return 'ar';
   334→  if (/[\u0900-\u097F]/.test(trimmed)) return 'hi';
   335→  if (/[\u0E00-\u0E7F]/.test(trimmed)) return 'th';
   336→
   337→  const spanishPatterns =
   338→    /\b(el|la|los|las|de|en|que|es|un|una|con|por|para)\b/gi;
   339→  const frenchPatterns = /\b(le|la|les|des|un|une|est|et|en|que|dans|pour)\b/gi;
   340→  const germanPatterns = /\b(der|die|das|ein|eine|und|ist|von|mit|auf|für)\b/gi;
   341→  const portuguesePatterns = /\b(o|a|os|as|de|em|que|é|um|uma|com|para)\b/gi;
   342→
   343→  const scores: {
   344→    lang: string;
   345→    count: number;
   346→  }[] = [
   347→    {
   348→      lang: 'es',
   349→      count: (trimmed.match(spanishPatterns) || []).length,
   350→    },
   351→    {
   352→      lang: 'fr',
   353→      count: (trimmed.match(frenchPatterns) || []).length,
   354→    },
   355→    {
   356→      lang: 'de',
   357→      count: (trimmed.match(germanPatterns) || []).length,
   358→    },
   359→    {
   360→      lang: 'pt',
   361→      count: (trimmed.match(portuguesePatterns) || []).length,
   362→    },
   363→  ];
   364→
   365→  scores.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
   366→  const best = scores[0];
   367→  if (best && best.count > 0) return best.lang;
   368→
   369→  return 'en';
   370→}
   371→
   372→export function mockTranslate(
   373→  text: string,
   374→  sourceLang: string,
   375→  targetLang: string,
   376→): {
   377→  translated: string;
   378→  detectedLang?: string;
   379→} {
   380→  if (!text.trim()) return { translated: '' };
   381→
   382→  let effectiveSource = sourceLang;
   383→  let detectedLang: string | undefined;
   384→
   385→  if (sourceLang === 'auto') {
   386→    effectiveSource = detectLanguage(text);
   387→    detectedLang = effectiveSource;
   388→  }
   389→
   390→  if (effectiveSource === targetLang) {
   391→    return {
   392→      translated: text,
   393→      detectedLang,
   394→    };
   395→  }
   396→
   397→  const knownTranslation = MOCK_TRANSLATIONS[effectiveSource]?.[targetLang];
   398→  if (knownTranslation && text.trim().toLowerCase() === 'hello, how are you?') {
   399→    return {
   400→      translated: knownTranslation,
   401→      detectedLang,
   402→    };
   403→  }
   404→
   405→  const swapped = simpleWordSwap(text, targetLang);
   406→  if (swapped !== `[${targetLang}] ${text}`) {
   407→    return {
   408→      translated: swapped,
   409→      detectedLang,
   410→    };
   411→  }
   412→
   413→  return {
   414→    translated: swapped,
   415→    detectedLang,
   416→  };
   417→}
   418→
   419→export const MOCK_HISTORY: TranslationHistoryEntry[] = [
   420→  {
   421→    id: 'th-1',
   422→    sourceText: 'Hello, how are you?',
   423→    translatedText: 'Hola, ¿cómo estás?',
   424→    sourceLang: 'en',
   425→    targetLang: 'es',
   426→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 30),
   427→  },
   428→  {
   429→    id: 'th-2',
   430→    sourceText: 'Good morning world',
   431→    translatedText: 'Bonjour monde',
   432→    sourceLang: 'en',
   433→    targetLang: 'fr',
   434→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 2),
   435→  },
   436→  {
   437→    id: 'th-3',
   438→    sourceText: 'Thank you very much',
   439→    translatedText: 'Vielen Danke sehr viel',
   440→    sourceLang: 'en',
   441→    targetLang: 'de',
   442→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 5),
   443→  },
   444→  {
   445→    id: 'th-4',
   446→    sourceText: 'The water is good',
   447→    translatedText: 'A água é bom',
   448→    sourceLang: 'en',
   449→    targetLang: 'pt',
   450→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24),
   451→  },
   452→  {
   453→    id: 'th-5',
   454→    sourceText: 'Please and thank you',
   455→    translatedText: 'Per favore e grazie',
   456→    sourceLang: 'en',
   457→    targetLang: 'it',
   458→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 48),
   459→  },
   460→];
   461→
